title: Consistent Spruce Doors
description: Make the lines on spruce doors consistent with spruce trapdoors!
body:
This resource pack adjusts the lines and coloring of spruce doors to better match spruce trapdoors.

I initially made this so I could make larger doors (using doors and trapdoors) but have the textures be consistent. There still seems to be some issues with the lighting that distinguish the door from the trapdoors, however this is as good as I can get it with my knowledge.
